context: Evaluates use of crypto-browserify's createHash as a Transform stream. The solution should use the hash object's streaming interface (write/end/on('data')) or pipe-based approach rather than calling update() and digest() directly.

checklist.name: Uses createHash streaming
checklist.description: The solution calls createHash(algorithm) and uses the returned object as a stream (via write(), end(), pipe(), or on() events), not just update()/digest().

checklist.name: Correct stream consumption
checklist.description: The solution correctly consumes stream output by listening for 'finish' or 'data' events, or by using pipe() to capture the hash digest after the stream ends.

checklist.name: Returns Promise
checklist.description: hashViaStream returns a Promise that resolves to the hex digest string once the stream finishes processing.

checklist.name: Handles multiple chunks
checklist.description: The streaming approach correctly accumulates data from multiple write() calls, producing the same digest as hashing the concatenated data at once.
